name: Circle
summary: The Circle class defines the graphical object circle. A circle can also be hatched.

constructors.name: Circle
constructors.summary: Creates a new circle instance with a center point and a radius using standard attributes.

constructors.name: Circle
constructors.summary: Creates a new circle instance with a center point and a radius using the given attributes.
